examples: The cavalry must immediately replenish the new horse.
If you replenish the ice sheets and frozen waters of the high latitudes, more light will be reflected back into space, so reducing the warming of the oceans and atmosphere.
Allow me to replenish your glass.
It's doubtful that any of the anticipated new drugs will replenish Pfizer's revenues quickly.
There is also a good wine shop next door to replenish your wine cellar.
